initial_test_output:
=== GraphQL DataLoader Per-Request Test ===
--- Compiling TypeScript ---
Compile: OK
--- Seeding database ---
Seeded database: 100 users, 500 posts
Seed: OK
--- Waiting for server ---
GraphQL server running on http://localhost:4000/graphql
Server: OK
--- Test 1: Fetch all users ---
OK: Got 100 users
--- Test 2: Fetch single user with posts ---
OK: User 1 has 5 posts
--- Test 3: Fetch recent posts with authors ---
OK: All posts have resolved authors
--- Test 4: Posts by department (JOIN query) ---
OK: postsByDepartment returns correct department-filtered posts
--- Test 5: Nested query correctness ---
OK: Nested user->posts->author references are correct

=== Performance Test: Query Count ===
Fetching 100 users with their posts in a single GraphQL query.
With proper DataLoader batching, this should require <=15 DB queries.
(1 for users + a small number of batched post queries)

Total DB queries executed: 101
FAIL: Query count 101 exceeds threshold of 15
      This indicates DataLoader batching is not working.
      Expected: 1 query for users + 1-2 batched queries for posts = ~2-3 total
      Got: 101 (likely N+1: 1 + 100 individual post queries)

FAIL: One or more tests failed
